creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

thank you for submitting this PR.
However, I noticed some issues with your submission and need your feedback
on those before being able to update the port.

1) Why do you comment out the GPL2 license line? It seems to be this license
is still used.

2) When applying your modifications the build stops during the patch phase.
Indeed, you seem to want to remove the patch-setup.py content (whereas it
still looks appropriate to me) and on the other hand you keep the
nls-patch-setup.py patch which does not seem to be relevant anymore to me.
Could you please clarify your intent?

Thanks for your help.
Regards,
Frederic (culot@)
